# Feature: MVE Dialog Lane Layout Fixes (scroll, width, card toolbar)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-06-28 -->

## Intent

Timeline-Label-Spalte und Lane-Inhalt scrollen gemeinsam (FL-Studio-Stil). Textcontainer-Breite folgt WPM/Default, ist aber auf die zugewiesene Szene gecappt; Szene wächst content-driven mit. Inline-Card: Icon-only Tags/Enhance, Löschen-Button, kein doppelter Charakter, lesbares Textfeld.

## Preconditions

- Hörspiel-Projekt (`projectType: audio`) mit MVE und Dialog-Spur
- Szene mit mindestens einem MVE-Textblock

## Happy Path

- [x] Vertikal scrollen über Labels oder Lanes bewegt beide Spalten synchron (kein unabhängiges Label-Scrollen) — *code-verified: unified `verticalScrollRef` parent, no scrollTop coupling*
- [x] Textblock-Breite überschreitet pinke Szene-Spur nicht (gecappt) — *Playwright: 120px cap confirmed*
- [ ] Nach Text-Eingabe wächst Szene content-driven (bestehender Sync) — *not browser-tested (requires full project with async sync)*
- [x] Card-Toolbar: Tags/Enhance nur Icon; Audio „+“-Dropdown; Löschen-Button neben Plus — *Playwright: icon-only confirmed, delete button visible + clickable*
- [x] Kein doppelter Charakter-Name in Sidebar und Card gleichzeitig — *Playwright: 0 `track-character-row` in card, 0 "Pazulu" text in card*
- [x] Szenen-Header zeigt Titel, nicht rohe Node-ID — *Playwright: "Szene 01" in card header*

## Edge Cases

- [x] Sehr schmale Szene: Block breiter als MIN_WIDTH nicht über Szene hinaus — *Playwright: 40px scene → width ≤ 41px*
- [ ] Film-Projekt: Label-Reihenfolge links = rechts (Shot → Audio → Clip → Musik → SFX) — *fixed in timeline-row-alignment Slice 1*

## Regression

- [x] Horizontaler Timeline-Scroll und Zoom unverändert — *code: `scrollRef` keeps `overflow-x-auto`; zoom hooks unchanged*
- [x] SFX/Music-Lanes unverändert — *code: no changes to sfx/music rendering paths*

## Assumptions

- Unified vertical scroll via gemeinsamer Parent-Container (kein scrollTop-Kopplungs-Hack)

## Implementation Notes

- Unified vertical scroll: labels + timeline lanes share `verticalScrollRef` parent; timeline keeps horizontal-only `scrollRef`. Removed `scrollTop` coupling and `handleLabelsWheel`.
- Scene-capped width via `resolveMveDialogClipWidthPx()` in text blocks and audio-bound dialog segments; `sceneBlock` passed from lane content.
- `getSceneLabel` uses `findSceneLabelInTree` (structure tree titles, not raw node IDs).
- `onDeleteLine` wired from `useMveLines.deleteLine` through lanes → card toolbar (Trash icon next to `+`).
- Card toolbar: icon-only Tags/Enhance; character row removed from card (sidebar only); dirty badge removed from header.
- Film projects: left label order reordered to Shot → Clip → Audio → Musik/SFX (matches right column).
